name: Game of Love
overview: After a broken family turns Nok into a jealous and bitter woman, she is forced into marriage with her childhood acquaintance Lakkhanai, plotting to drive him away - only to discover his love for her is genuine.

trailers.title: เกมเสน่หา เสนอพรุ่งนี้ เป็นตอนแรก | Ch3Thailand
